## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss Knapsack's progress, strategy, and marketing efforts with GrowthX Labs team.](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Knapsack is refocusing on Windows compatibility and a simpler AI note-taking tool for initial user experience](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Website redesign in progress, targeting financial advisors but considering broadening to "regulated industries"](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Significant improvement in SEO metrics: authority score up to 22, increased backlinks and organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Email outreach campaign showing promise with positive replies, but post-reply engagement needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

## Topics

### Product Strategy and Website Redesign

  - [Shifting focus to Windows compatibility due to financial advisor target market](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Simplifying initial product offering to AI note-taking tool](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [New website design in progress, debating between narrow (financial advisors) vs. broader (regulated industries) focus](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Considering "For professionals in regulated industries" as a compromise to target finance, insurance, and healthcare](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### SEO and Content Marketing Progress

  - [Authority score increased from 0 to 22, indicating natural, non-forced growth](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Organic traffic growing, reaching 1200-1400 visitors per month](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [50,000 total impressions on blog posts, with 642 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [40+ keywords ranking in top 10 search results](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Content refresh completed for 35 articles to improve performance](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [New bottom-of-funnel articles planned, tailored for financial advisors](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

### Email Outbound Campaign

  - [9 positive replies received during holiday period](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Implementing a post-reply subsequence to maintain engagement](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Two types of responses: general interest and specific objections/alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Considering additional engagement methods (e.g., LinkedIn) but cautious about aggressive tactics like cold calling](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [Creating a tracking system for follow-ups and progress monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Proceed with publishing new bottom-of-funnel articles tailored for financial advisors](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Implement and monitor the post-reply email subsequence for better engagement](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Create a shared sheet to track status and progress of interested leads](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
  - [Prioritize email outbound discussions in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
  - [Continue refining website messaging to balance between financial advisors and broader regulated industries focus](https://fathom.video/share/nWcqPazdEhq7fx_q5jBxTzFdsVGY3sjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
